info.name: KhidmaNow APIs
info.description: Comprehensive and organized API collection for the KhidmaNow Backend. Contains detailed requests, parameters, payloads, and mock responses for all authentication, CMS, reference, user profile, chat, support, client, provider, and administrative APIs.

request.description: Authenticate user with email or phone. Returns bearer access token.

response.name: Validation Error

request.description: Authenticate/Register using Google or Apple authentication identity token.
Checks the phone number and dispatches a verification code SMS. Purpose can be 'register' or 'reset_password'.
Request a password reset code. Dispatches SMS code to the registered phone number.
Verify the code received via SMS to proceed with verification action.
Reset user password after verifying the SMS code.
Register a new customer account using verified phone verification code.
Register a service provider. Subcategories and documents can be provided. Note: For files (documents), use multipart/form-data key `documents[0][file]` and type `documents[0][type]`.

request.description: Revokes the current access token. Optionally pass device_token to remove the device's push-notification token.
Update the password for the currently authenticated user.

response.name: Success
Success

query.description: Optional. The current device's FCM token — when provided, the response's receive_notifications reflects that device's setting.

request.description: Pass fcm_token as an optional query param to get that device's notification (enabled/disabled) status back in receive_notifications.
